body:
### Why this matters

Google Cloud Functions Go 1.24 has a published deprecation date of September 2, 2026 and decommission date of March 2, 2027. Functions should be migrated before redeployments become risky or blocked by runtime lifecycle restrictions.

### What this control checks

This control finds Google Cloud Functions using the `go124` runtime. Upgrade to `go125` or newer after testing dependencies and build behavior.

### Operational note

Go runtime upgrades can require module updates, rebuilds of native dependencies, and validation of startup, HTTP handlers, background functions, and CloudEvents handlers.
name: Ensure Google Cloud Functions are not using Go 1.24
description: Google Cloud Functions using Go 1.24 before deprecation
timedControlSummary: Google Cloud Functions on Go 1.24 should be migrated before the September 2, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlDisruptionRisk: Late runtime migrations can block safe redeployments and require urgent code or dependency changes.
remediationDescription:
## Google Cloud remediation

> **Runtime migration program (recommended):** migrate functions by application or runtime family. This lets teams validate Go modules, buildpacks, triggers, IAM, and observability consistently.

### Google Cloud Console

1. Open **Cloud Functions** and select the affected function.
2. Review triggers, environment variables, service account, ingress, and build settings.
3. Update the runtime to `go125` or newer.
4. Redeploy through your normal release process and validate logs, metrics, and trigger delivery.

### gcloud CLI

Inspect the current runtime:

```bash
gcloud functions describe <function-name> \
  --region <region> \
  --format='value(runtime,status)'
```

Redeploy with a supported runtime, keeping your existing trigger and source flags:

```bash
gcloud functions deploy <function-name> \
  --region <region> \
  --runtime go125
```

### References

- https://cloud.google.com/functions/docs/runtime-support
- https://cloud.google.com/sdk/gcloud/reference/functions/deploy

timedControlRules.summary: Google Cloud Functions on Go 1.24 should be migrated before the September 2, 2026 deprecation date.
timedControlRules.disruptionRisk: Late runtime migrations can block safe redeployments and require urgent code or dependency changes.
timedControlRules.recommendedTarget: Set runtime to go125 or newer after compatibility testing.
